about.title: The gift card reimagined for the video era
about.intro: 4you is a digital gift card platform that places emotion at the heart of the experience. We believe a gift is not just an amount — it's a message, an intention, a shared moment.
about.value1_body: Gift cards for the brands you love, enriched with a personal video message.
about.value2_body: A unique QR code on each voucher gives access to the video message recorded by the giver.
about.value3_body: Order in less than 3 minutes, PDF voucher generated instantly, zero friction.
about.story_1: Born from a simple observation: existing digital gift cards are functional, but cold. A 16-digit code in an email is convenient — but it's far from a real gift.
about.story_2: 4you changes this by adding a layer of humanity: a short video message, recorded in a few seconds, accessible via QR code at the moment the recipient discovers their gift. This small detail changes everything.

tech.title: Integrate the 4you video solution
tech.intro: 4you exposes a simple REST API to create orders, generate PDF vouchers and host associated video messages. This page describes the architecture and key integration points.
tech.video_intro: The video message is recorded client-side via
